senses.example: I have fitted a device to my bike which improves the speed.
senses.example_zh: 我在我的自行车上装了一个提高速度的装置。

senses.def_en: a plan or scheme for accomplishing sth.
senses.example: Silence is a device to avoid disputes.
senses.example_zh: 沉默是避免争吵的一个策略。

senses.example: An ingenious idea suddenly came upon me.
senses.example_zh: 我突然想到了一个绝妙的主意。

derivatives: ingenuity n. 心灵手巧;独创性

senses.def_en: to bring sth. into being; or to produce through artistic or imaginative effort
senses.example: Some believe the universe was created by a big explosion. // A novelist creates characters and a plot.
senses.example_zh: 有些人认为宇宙是由于大爆炸而形成的。// 小说家塑造人物并设计作品的情节。

senses.example: It's bound to create trouble sooner or later.
senses.example_zh: 迟早注定要引起麻烦的。

senses.example: Modern education attaches great importance to cultivating a new creative generation.
senses.example_zh: 现代教育非常重视培育有创造力的新一代。

senses.example: This book is too theoretical; I need a practical one.
senses.example_zh: 这本书理论性太强,我需要一本实用的。

derivatives: theory n. 理论;学说;意见

senses.example: Please inform us of your decision and we will act accordingly.
senses.example_zh: 请把你们的决定通知我们,我们会照着去办。

senses.example: The weather has changed suddenly, and accordingly we must put off the football match.
senses.example_zh: 天气突变,因此我们不得不推迟足球比赛。

senses.def_en: in a way that fulfils or agrees with
senses.example: The skill of commercial negotiations is not always in accordance with textbooks.
senses.example_zh: 商务谈判的技巧不总是和教科书上的一样。

senses.example: Their views were found to be in perfect accord.
senses.example_zh: 人们发现他们的意见是完全一致的。

senses.def_en: a settlement or compromise between conflicting parties
senses.example: The two countries reached an accord.

senses.def_en: to match or agree with sth. (~with)
to give sb. or sth. special attention or a particular type of treatment
senses.example: We accord great importance to education.
senses.example_zh: 我们对教育给予高度重视。

senses.example: He has a good sense of smell.
Many words have more than one sense.
senses.example_zh: 许多词有不止一个义项。

extras.title: device
extras.content: leave to one's own devices 听任…自便 I just gave her a brush and paints, and left her to her own devices. 我只给了她一支画笔和一些颜料,就让她自己发挥了。
Devices like Kindle make reading more convenient and are a lot more environmentally friendly than the traditional paper book. 译文:像 Kindle 这类设备使得阅读比起在传统纸张上进行的阅读更为方便,也环保得多。

extras.title: accord
extras.content: of one's own accord 出于自愿 // with one accord 一致地 // in accord with 与…一致 The two sides are completely in accord with each other on this matter. 双方在这个问题上意见完全一致。
